name: IDOX plc
summary: Idox plc, through its subsidiaries, provides software solutions and information services for the management of local government and other organizations. The company operates through three segments: Public Sector Software, Engineering Information Management, and Content. It offers tools to manage information and knowledge, documents, content, business processes, and workflow, as well as connects directly with the citizens through the Web; elections management solutions; and decision support content, which include grants and planning policy information, as well as corporate compliance services. The company also provides engineering document control, project collaboration, and facility management applications to companies in industries, such as oil and gas, architecture and construction, mining, utilities, pharmaceuticals, and transportation. It has operations primarily in the United Kingdom, the United States, Europe, and Australia. Idox plc was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Reading, the United Kingdom.
